frameworks.name: value homeostasis
frameworks.one_line: medial frontal network maintains balance among multiple internal goals

frameworks.name: neuroeconomic value coding
frameworks.one_line: vmPFC/dACC encode decision-relevant value signals during choice

core_question: How does the human medial prefrontal cortex compute value signals that balance multiple competing internal goals?
key_assumptions: financial payoff depends on the minimum of two accumulated assets
BOLD signals index goal-relevant value computations
homeostatic imbalance and homeostatic redress are separable signals
manipulations: two distinct assets accumulated across a trial sequence
payoff rule tied to minimum cumulate forcing rebalancing
key_findings: dACC BOLD tracked homeostatic imbalance among goals
vmPFC BOLD signalled homeostatic redress incurred by a choice rather than total amount received
interpretations: medial frontal network computes a value signal that maintains homeostatic balance among internal goals
